payload.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
payload.narrative: META operates the Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp platforms, generating the majority of revenue from digital advertising while investing heavily in AI-driven content ranking, recommender systems, and the Reality Labs metaverse/AR-VR segment. The company is on the watchlist because its advertising engine scales with AI infrastructure spending and engagement growth, making it a key node in the AI supply chain alongside its core social media monetization. This card is for educational research purposes only.
catalysts: Quarterly earnings and forward guidance cadence
Sector-specific demand cycle and supply-chain signals
Macro regime shifts affecting risk appetite
